sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The game is over again. The timer ran out before I could complete the level. Looking at the image, the character is on the left side of the divider, and the dark gray L-shape is on the right side. The yellow L-shape is at the bottom right.
The character crossed the divider (from right to left), and the dark gray L-shape moved to the character's previous position on the right side. But the dark gray L-shape is now at rows ~24-32, cols ~36-44, which is not the yellow L-shape's position (rows 45-53, cols 51-59).
The problem is that I was not at the yellow L-shape's position when I crossed the divider. I was at rows ~44-52, cols ~54-62, which is close but not exactly at the yellow L-shape's position.
Wait, looking at the image, the dark gray L-shape is at rows ~24-32, cols ~36-44. This is not where the character was before crossing. The character was at rows ~44-52, cols ~54-62.
Actually, looking more carefully at the image, the dark gray L-shape is on the right side of the divider, at rows ~24-32. The character is on the left side, at rows ~24-32. This suggests that the dark gray L-shape moved to the character's previous position when the character crossed the divider.
But the character's previous position was at rows ~44-52, cols ~54-62, not rows ~24-32, cols ~36-44. So something is wrong with my understanding.
Wait, looking at the image again, the character is on the left side of the divider, at rows ~24-32. The dark gray L-shape is on the right side of the divider, at rows ~24-32. This suggests that the character and dark gray L-shape are at the same vertical level.
But the character was at rows ~44-52 before crossing. So the character must have moved UP before crossing, or the dark gray L-shape moved to a different position.
Actually, I think the issue is that the character's position tracking is incorrect. The segmentation shows the character at top=0, left=63, which doesn't match the image.
Let me restart the level with SPACE and try a different approach. This time, I'll try to be more precise about the character's position and the crossing mechanic.
Actually, looking at the image, the character is on the left side of the divider, at rows ~24-32. The dark gray L-shape is on the right side, at rows ~24-32. The yellow L-shape is at rows 45-53, cols 51-59.
The dark gray L-shape is at the same vertical level as the character, not the yellow L-shape. This means the crossing mechanic didn't work as expected, or I misunderstood it.
Let me restart and try a different approach. Maybe the goal is to move the dark gray L-shape to the yellow L-shape's position by crossing the divider at the correct position.
Actually, I think the issue is that I need to be at the exact position of the yellow L-shape when crossing the divider. The character was at rows ~44-52, cols ~54-62, which is close to the yellow L-shape's position (rows 45-53, cols 51-59), but not exactly the same.
Let me restart and try to be more precise.
